GFQG0aNbKHXc4s0EWTym.resolution: Fix guideline selection checkpoint modal placement - moved to overlay modal

PDYmePZLMJN5Ma9ovvtS.issue: Compound field formatting (Systolic 130 → BP 130/74 at 30 weeks)
PDYmePZLMJN5Ma9ovvtS.resolution: Add LLM-based formatting endpoint /formatClinicalData to format clinical measurements naturally

shJ0PmrV9wE70rUNuYIb.issue: Hemorrhage risk suggestions lack clinical context (missing personnel/equipment details)
shJ0PmrV9wE70rUNuYIb.resolution: Enhanced guideline analysis prompt to require specific personnel, equipment, and contingencies for high-risk scenarios

FCaEIY34StYxbsvJdRtN.issue: Insertion preview appears to already be in the note before pressing Insert
FCaEIY34StYxbsvJdRtN.resolution: Added 'Pending insertion — press Insert to confirm:' label above preview text; strengthened CSS with dashed green border and distinct label styling

5aZWNziguX031uRi2VNM.issue: Suggestions placed in text before pressing Insert with no visual distinction
5aZWNziguX031uRi2VNM.resolution: Same as FCaEIY34 — insertion preview now clearly labelled as pending with green dashed border

IVecsVQIPnaPEg2cFyiY.issue: Missing info wizard asked for gestational age when already present in note (32+4)
IVecsVQIPnaPEg2cFyiY.resolution: Strengthened /assessNoteCompletenessStructured prompt rule 3 with explicit examples: '32+4' means gestation IS present, '28yo' means age IS present — scan entire note including headers

2WzE4ElzGeHa0P1iZ600.issue: Missing info wizard asked for patient age when already present in note (28yo)
2WzE4ElzGeHa0P1iZ600.resolution: Same as IVecsVQIPnaPEg2cFyiY — prompt now explicitly flags age and gestational age detection from headers/opening lines

jpXN8upMafJ115p3Sdcz.issue: Insertion preview text leaked into committed note content
jpXN8upMafJ115p3Sdcz.resolution: Replaced DOM-injection approach with content-based INSERTION_PLACEHOLDER (⟨TEXT TO BE INSERTED HERE⟩) inserted via TipTap API; on Insert placeholder is replaced in-place, on Skip/Close it is removed cleanly

bqoT6kxvzkUowrKMPbmu.issue: Existing placeholder line in note (e.g. 'Blood Pressure') not highlighted before user fills wizard
bqoT6kxvzkUowrKMPbmu.resolution: showInsertionPreview now replaces the replace_pattern/missing_info line with the styled ⟨TEXT TO BE INSERTED HERE⟩ placeholder so the user can see exactly where their input will land

spE6nFMSxmW4clntuNJ4.issue: Completeness wizard asked for BP when note said 'vital signs within normal limits'
spE6nFMSxmW4clntuNJ4.resolution: Rewrote /assessNoteCompletenessStructured prompt using reasoning principles: implied information counts as present — model now uses clinical judgement rather than pattern matching

jAoIciFHzAkYJ0XRwbS6.issue: Completeness wizard asked for consent documentation when risks already documented in note
jAoIciFHzAkYJ0XRwbS6.resolution: Same as spE6nFMSxmW4clntuNJ4 — prompt rewrite instructs model to treat logically implied information as present

5m987u2bnucLNSyodmuS.issue: Review all vs high-only step is unhelpful, should default to all sorted by priority
5m987u2bnucLNSyodmuS.resolution: showSummaryDashboard was already dead code — current flow goes directly to wizard with suggestions sorted high→medium→low. Removed the unused function.

gPHsO6UptY5sQzJgURF0.issue: Empty suggestion text alert still firing
gPHsO6UptY5sQzJgURF0.resolution: Fixed in v9.0.25 (id= uniqueId added to sw-wrap); this submission was before that deploy

bYBajf3nlc7DeeWI26an.issue: Contradictory guideline suggestions: continuous fetal monitoring AND CTG every 4 hours in same plan
bYBajf3nlc7DeeWI26an.resolution: Added SELF-CONSISTENCY CHECK principle to /dynamicAdvice system prompt: model must review suggestions as a set before returning, remove logical contradictions, and ensure the set is internally coherent

4qCNiEIazKxxMq3b8g5n.issue: Completeness wizard asked for uterotonics when misoprostol already documented in note
4qCNiEIazKxxMq3b8g5n.resolution: Same class as spE6nFMS — v9.0.29 prompt rewrite instructs model to treat logically implied information as present. Misoprostol is a uterotonic; if it appears in the note, uterotonics are documented.

zUOarD38zVJkkBdI5zkm.issue: Completeness wizard asked for anti-D administration when note already said 'Will need anti-D if required — check records'
zUOarD38zVJkkBdI5zkm.resolution: Same class as spE6nFMS — v9.0.29 prompt rewrite instructs model to treat logically implied information as present. A documented conditional anti-D plan is a present anti-D entry.

5tqZcMRSnybUltPrO6lG.issue: Completeness wizard asked for postnatal contraception discussion during acute secondary PPH presentation
5tqZcMRSnybUltPrO6lG.resolution: Strengthened STEP 2 of /assessNoteCompletenessStructured prompt: acute/emergency encounters must not flag routine preventive or future-planning items that are clinically inappropriate to address during the acute encounter

DZalnlfTinpmh0QBh31u.issue: Guideline suggestion: wrong insertion point, vague suggestion, no verbatim quote
DZalnlfTinpmh0QBh31u.resolution: 1) showInsertionPreview now maps guideline suggestion fields (originalText for modifications, guidelineReference as section target) so placeholder lands in the correct part of the note. 2) Added RELEVANCE CHECK principle to /dynamicAdvice: do not suggest things already documented in the note. 3) Verbatim quoting already handled by hasVerbatimQuote field — no change needed.

dy9bGUjMQ5eIhcnFar6A.issue: Guideline suggested USS rescan when USS was already documented in the note
dy9bGUjMQ5eIhcnFar6A.resolution: RELEVANCE CHECK principle added to /dynamicAdvice in v9.0.34: model must verify a step is not already documented before suggesting it

kH9wyyqXKaM2rtQjOdLz.issue: Nonsensical suggestion to confirm gestational age when patient is already 32+4 weeks
kH9wyyqXKaM2rtQjOdLz.resolution: RELEVANCE CHECK principle added to /dynamicAdvice in v9.0.34: gestational age is in the header — model must not suggest confirming information already clearly documented

tzHc9RpDP7iUrCl8aFmZ.issue: BP value inserted in the wrong place by the missing info wizard
tzHc9RpDP7iUrCl8aFmZ.resolution: showInsertionPreview improved in v9.0.34 to better locate insertion point using target_section and guidelineReference; falls back to list-context detection if no section match found

zhCeSXghvvJ5HOZxQ0Ta.issue: USS/BPP suggested when CTG would be more appropriate for fetal hydrops
zhCeSXghvvJ5HOZxQ0Ta.resolution: Added CLINICAL SPECIFICITY CHECK principle to /dynamicAdvice: recommended monitoring method must match the clinical urgency — do not suggest a less direct method when the situation calls for a more informative approach

8DzptrAcd00DK6jLwYF9.issue: Transverse lie suggestion should prompt USS confirmation of presentation at current visit if not documented
8DzptrAcd00DK6jLwYF9.resolution: Same CLINICAL SPECIFICITY CHECK: added recency test — a previous-visit result does not substitute for current-visit confirmation when management depends on the current clinical state

mV2Kc6IkaoOFEBLuPDJp.issue: SGA/FGR guideline not returned by vector search for FGR case
mV2Kc6IkaoOFEBLuPDJp.resolution: Root cause: bulk ingest stored full hospitalTrust name in Pinecone metadata but scope filter uses shortHospitalTrust ('UHSussex'). Fixed rag-ingestion.js to store shortHospitalTrust preferentially. Requires re-ingest of local guidelines via admin panel.

1tzvxRstJfWUbrvbCURt.issue: Completeness wizard asked for Fetal Heart Rate as a numeric value at 32 weeks with FGR/RFM — should be CTG
1tzvxRstJfWUbrvbCURt.resolution: Updated data type selection rules in /assessNoteCompletenessStructured: numeric must not be used for fetal heart rate monitoring in pregnancy; added general principle that data type must reflect realistic documentation method

TbulgJamkd1DpjtTajAg.issue: Reduced fetal movements guideline not included in Check Against Guidelines
TbulgJamkd1DpjtTajAg.resolution: Root cause: 'reduced-fetal-movements-guideline-pdf' was not indexed in Pinecone (vectorDbIngested was undefined). Fixed by re-ingesting via admin panel. Also triggered full re-ingest of all 374 guidelines (18,016 chunks) — previously only 16/374 had embeddings.
